TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Kdusan, title = Kdusan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kdusan} }

S.FORM: == Kdusan == u sulit nu Hulam: ś†ľÁĚ£ŚįöťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Kdusan. u kasalumaluma' nu Kdusan sa, 364 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 1,201 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 1,069 ku tademaw, pakalatu 89%. u zuma sa, cay ku yuangcumin, 132 ku tademaw, pakalatu 11%. u asip nu cidekay a tademaw u kasabinacadan, Taluku(Truku) 70%, Pangcha(Amis) 9%, Tayan(Tayal) 3%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 1%, Sejek(Seediq) 0.5%, zumazuma 4%. u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis) u niyazu' nu Taluku(Truku) kuyni, katuud ku Taluku(Truku) itini mueneng. u zuma a tademaw sa u Yuwatan(Bunun), u Tayan atu Sejek. inayi' tu ku zuma cidekay a tademaw itini mueneng. u Sakizaya a tademaw inayi' ku Sakizaya a tademaw mueneng itini, hakay izaw tu, caay henay misumad ku cidekay a ngangan nu Sakizaya. u siwkay nu Yuancumin u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin tademaw nu Yuancumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihcan 11 a bulad tademaw nu Yuancumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2019 a mihcan 1 a bulad pulung sausi (566,129), Pangcah (211,279), Tayan (91,021), Paywan (101,560), Yuwatan (58,994), Rukay (13,390), Puyuma (14,358), Cou (6,668), Saysiat (6,676), Yami (4,635), Saw (803), Kabalan (1,482), Taluku (31,859), Sakizaya (961), Sejek (10,202), Laaluwa (405), Kanakanabu (345), zuma (11,541)
S.PHON: == kdusan == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: ***** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu kdusan. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu kdusan sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *,*** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *,*** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku juaŇč ¶umin, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u asip nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, tar~…ĺuku(truku) **%, paŇč ¶ńßa(amis) *%, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) *%, juwatan(bunun) *%, s…ôj…ôk(s…ô…ôdi*) *.*%, zumazuma *%. u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis) u nijazu Ē~ ° nu tar~…ĺuku(truku) kujni, katuud ku tar~…ĺuku(truku) itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u juwatan(bunun), u tajan atu s…ôj…ôk. inaji Ē~ ° tu ku zuma ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inaji Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇč itini, ńßakaj izaw tu, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj misumad ku ¶id…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja. u siwkaj nu juan ¶umin u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin tad…ômaw nu juan ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an ** a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu juan ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***)
S.FORM: == Kdusan == u sulit nu Hulam: ś†ľÁĚ£ŚįöťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Kdusan. u kasalumaluma' nu Kdusan sa, 364 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 1,201 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 1,069 ku tademaw, pakalatu 89%. u zuma sa, cay ku yuangcumin, 132 ku tademaw, pakalatu 11%. u asip nu cidekay a tademaw u kasabinacadan, Taluku(Truku) 70%, Pangcha(Amis) 9%, Tayan(Tayal) 3%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 1%, Sejek(Seediq) 0.5%, zumazuma 4%. u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis) u niyazu' nu Taluku(Truku) kuyni, katuud ku Taluku(Truku) itini mueneng. u zuma a tademaw sa u Yuwatan(Bunun), u Tayan atu Sejek. inayi' tu ku zuma cidekay a tademaw itini mueneng. u Sakizaya a tademaw inayi' ku Sakizaya a tademaw mueneng itini, hakay izaw tu, caay henay misumad ku cidekay a ngangan nu Sakizaya. u siwkay nu Yuancumin u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin tademaw nu Yuancumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihcan 11 a bulad tademaw nu Yuancumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2019 a mihcan 1 a bulad pulung sausi (566,129), Pangcah (211,279), Tayan (91,021), Paywan (101,560), Yuwatan (58,994), Rukay (13,390), Puyuma (14,358), Cou (6,668), Saysiat (6,676), Yami (4,635), Saw (803), Kabalan (1,482), Taluku (31,859), Sakizaya (961), Sejek (10,202), Laaluwa (405), Kanakanabu (345), zuma (11,541)
S.PHON: == kdusan == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: ***** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu kdusan. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu kdusan sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *,*** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *,*** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku juaŇč ¶umin, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u asip nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, tar~…ĺuku(truku) **%, paŇč ¶ńßa(amis) *%, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) *%, juwatan(bunun) *%, s…ôj…ôk(s…ô…ôdi*) *.*%, zumazuma *%. u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis) u nijazu Ē~ ° nu tar~…ĺuku(truku) kujni, katuud ku tar~…ĺuku(truku) itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u juwatan(bunun), u tajan atu s…ôj…ôk. inaji Ē~ ° tu ku zuma ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inaji Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇč itini, ńßakaj izaw tu, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj misumad ku ¶id…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja. u siwkaj nu juan ¶umin u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin tad…ômaw nu juan ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an ** a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu juan ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***)
